title: Portfolio Management Techniques: An investor wants to form a portfolio that has an...
summary: Calculate portfolio expected return as the weighted average of component asset returns.
prompt: An investor wants to form a portfolio that has an expected return of 12%. If they are investing 50% in a stock with an expected return of 20% and the rest in a risk-free asset with a return of 3%, how much should they invest in the risk-free asset?
solution: Set up the equation: 0.5(20%) + 0.5(r_f) = 12%. Solve for r_f.
